analysis: The project currently has a basic structure with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files. The theme is not yet defined, and there are no specific UI elements related to black holes. The improvements should focus on creating a dark, cosmic theme with animations and interactive elements that reflect the topic of black holes.

improvements.description: Update the CSS file to include a dark, cosmic theme with animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Add Egyptian-themed color palette and UI elements.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Update the JavaScript file to include event listeners and functionality for the new buttons added in test-website/index.html. Ensure all functions are properly implemented and the mobile menu toggle functionality is improved with smooth transitions and user-friendly interactions.
